name: yaq-ai
description: YAQ-AI: 安全监管智能工作台

scripts.build:js: npx terser js/skill-engine.js -o dist/js/skill-engine.js --compress --mangle --comments false && npx terser js/data/mock-data.js -o dist/js/data/mock-data.js --compress --mangle --comments false && npx terser js/app.js -o dist/js/app.js --compress --mangle --comments false && npx terser js/track-store.js -o dist/js/track-store.js --compress --mangle --comments false && npx terser js/rules.js -o dist/js/rules.js --compress --mangle --comments false && npx terser js/agent-init.js -o dist/js/agent-init.js --compress --mangle --comments false
scripts.build:html: cp index.html dist/ && cp 404.html dist/ && cp ai-vs-traditional-comparison.html dist/ && cp special-inspection-prototype.html dist/ && cp favicon.svg dist/ && cp .nojekyll dist/ && cp robots.txt dist/ && cp manifest.json dist/ && cp sw.js dist/ && cp apple-touch-icon.png dist/ && cp pwa-icon-192.png dist/ && cp pwa-icon-512.png dist/ && mkdir -p dist/js/components && cp js/lucide.min.js dist/js/ && cp js/skill-engine.js dist/js/ && cp js/components/bottom-input-bar.js dist/js/components/ && cp js/components/quick-chip.js dist/js/components/ && cp js/components/card-primitives.js dist/js/components/ && mkdir -p dist/splash && ([ -d splash ] && cp splash/*.png dist/splash/ || true)
scripts.deploy: echo '部署通过 GitHub Actions 自动完成 (git push → deploy-pages.yml)'
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test
